title: Talent Acquisition Manager
description:
The role 

ERM is hiring an experienced TA / Recruitment Manager to lead ourcombined Global Delivery Centre & Consulting Hub based in India.

Reporting to the regional Director you play a pivotal role in buildinga high-performing team in a high growth market whilst also being responsible for recruiting certain roles aligned with our organization's values and sustainability-focused mission.

As our organisation has scaled at pace we’re a developing functionwith huge passion and drive, you will need to be able to balance rolling your sleeves up with strategic influence as we embed best practice and build partnership with stakeholders to achieve business goals.

In this role you will

  • This is an interim role to build the future operating model to achieve business growth needs.
  • Lead, mentor, and develop a team of talent acquisition specialists, in house and RPO, to ensure effective hiring practices and meet hiring targets.
  • Design and implement innovative and scalablerecruitment strategies that align with business objectives.
  • Lead projects aligned to processoptimisations and enhancing the recruitment experience for Candidate and Hiring Managers.
  • Leverage accurate data-driven insights and strategic consultative hiring to cultivate a deeper engagement with our stakeholders.
  • Oversee and enhance employer branding efforts.
  • Utilise data-driven recruitment metrics to analyse hiring trends, recruiter performance and improve efficiency.
  • Ensure compliance with labour laws and company policies in all hiring activities.
  • Stay updated on industry trends and best practices to continuously improve the recruitment process.

About you

You will have significant depth in recruiting capability and in particular the sustainability / environmental / consulting industry along with outstanding people leadership and development skills, managing cross country and remotely based individuals.

Excellent engagement and stakeholder management skills; able to forge strong working relationships, build the ERM brand and develop robust hiring strategies, and be passionate about delivering a first-class candidate experience.

Skills and attributes:

  • You will have a background in sustainability / environmental / consulting the proven depth of experience in early talent hiring, specifically in building and developing programs within growth markets.
  • Strategic and data driven mindset with the ability to think critically and convey complex insights in a clear and compelling manner.
  • Excellent engagement and stakeholder management skills; able to forge strong working relationships that translate into shared outcomes.  
  • A research-based approach to recruitment. Demonstrated ability to leverage market data to tell stories, shape requirements and influence hiring decisions.
  • Passionate about building a better future - We don’t just talk about the future; we help shape it. We operationalize sustainability; from strategy to implementation.

postedCompany.description:
Environmental Resources Management (ERM) Environmental Resources Management (ERM) is a leading global provider of environmental, health, safety, risk, social consulting services and sustainability related services. We have more than 160 offices in over 40 countries and territories employing more than 5,000 people who work on projects around the world. ERM is committed to providing a service that is consistent, professional and of the highest quality to create value for our clients. We have worked with many of the Global Fortune 500 companies delivering innovative solutions for business and selected government clients helping them understand and manage the sustainability challenges that the world is increasingly facing.


For over 40 years we have been working with clients around the world and in diverse industry sectors to help them to understand and manage their environmental, health, safety, risk and social impacts. The key sectors we serve include Oil & Gas, Mining, Power, Manufacturing, Chemical and Pharmaceutical, and Technology, Media & Telecommunications. All face critical sustainability challenges and our clients in these and many other areas rely on our ability to assist them operate more sustainably which has a positive impact on our planet.
postedCompany.name: ENVIRONMENTAL RESOURCES MANAGEMENT (S) PTE LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
